steps.t: The ruins of Tuntham can be found north-east of Bâr Húrin. You should travel to Tuntham and learn if Faramir is still there.
The ruins of Tuntham can be found north-east of Bâr Húrin. You should locate the cairn on the western side of the ruins and look around.
The ruins of Tuntham can be found north-east of Bâr Húrin. You should locate the cairn on the northern side of the ruins and look around.
Faramir's Look-out is located south-east of Osgiliath. You should travel to Faramir's Look-out.
Faramir's Look-out is located south-east of Osgiliath. You should speak with a Ranger at Faramir's Look-out.
